meaning: vt.掷,弹,轻击,(用鞭等)抽打,空翻vi.用指轻弹,抽打,翻动书页(或纸张),蹦跳n.抛,弹,筋斗adj.无礼的,冒失的,轻率的
examples: The handstand was followed by a back flip.
The United States, the wealthiest nation on earth, presents the flip side of this paradox.
You will also be given some shoes by your attendant - either traditional wooden clogs or fluorescent flip-flops.
